title: Quilt Minims
description: Modpack optimises the game for players with weak pc, also suitable for multiplayer.
body:
# Quilt Minims

**Quilt Minims is designed for players with weak PC. It also allows you to play on minecraft servers. It contains all quality mods that allow you to optimise your gameplay. It is already configured for weak PCs, but you can also play with it on any other PC. Quilt Minims is created especially for [Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/en/) to support its developers and also to help players who have weak PCs.**

---
Quilt Minims contains additional, not related to optimisation mods: **[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports), [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3), [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer)**. You can disable them if you don't need them.

## Details:

Key features of Quilt Minims include support for Quilt's mod loader exclusively, which gives it a significant opportunity to develop **[Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/en/)** as a platform for mods, and for the community as a whole.

Among the features of Quilt Minims is its initial customisation for players with weak PCs. For more comfortable play on servers and in single-player game modpack uses such mods as: [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports), [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3), [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer). Quilt Minims supports sodium and add-ons to it, but based on the original idea of the modpack, the mod to work iris shaders is not added to the collection. 
Among the pluses of Quilt Minims is noted fast game language switching, fast startup and loading the world. moderate RAM consumption, fresh mod loader **Quilt 0.20.0**, customised config for [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) and much more.

Quilt Minims was founded by me based on the numerous wishes of players with weak PC. The project seeks to create all comfortable conditions for playing Minecraft for everyone.


---
